name: Jade
desc: A senior manager in the IPC Strategic Investment Department and one of the Ten Stonehearts, known for her cornerstone "Jade of Credit."\nA beautiful and elegant moneylender, she is skilled in deciphering the depths of people's minds, with a personal hobby called "Bonajade Exchange."\nShe's willing to wait patiently for high-value acquisitions and adept at extracting value from seemingly destitute clients.

1.name: Altruism? Nevertheless Tradable
1.desc: The <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> DMG from Jade's Talent increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After the "Debt Collector" character attacks and the number of the enemy target(s) hit is either 2 or 1, Jade additionally gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> or <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Charge respectively.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

2.name: Morality? Herein Authenticated
2.desc: When there are <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stacks of Pawned Asset, Jade's CRIT Rate increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Honesty? Soon Mortgaged
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Sincerity? Put Option Only
4.desc: When using Ultimate, enables the DMG dealt by Jade to ignore <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of enemy targets' DEF, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

5.name: Hope? Hitherto Forfeited
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Equity? Pending Sponsorship
6.desc: While the "Debt Collector" character exists on the field, Jade's Quantum <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, and Jade gains the "Debt Collector" state.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

131401.name: Lash of Riches
131401.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jade's ATK to one designated enemy target, and Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jade's ATK to adjacent enemies.
131401.simple_desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy and minor Quantum DMG to enemies adjacent to it.

131402.name: Acquisition Surety
131402.desc:
Makes a single target ally become the Debt Collector and increases their SPD by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
After the Debt Collector attacks, deals 1 instance of Quantum <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jade's ATK to each enemy target hit, and consumes the Debt Collector's HP by an amount equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of their Max HP. If the current HP is insufficient, reduces HP to 1.
If Jade becomes the Debt Collector, she cannot gain the SPD boost effect, and her attacks do not consume HP.
When the Debt Collector exists on the field, Jade cannot use her Skill. At the start of Jade's every turn, the Debt Collector's duration decreases by 1 turn.
131402.simple_desc: Makes a single ally become the <color=#f29e38ff>Debt Collector</color> and increases their SPD. After the <color=#f29e38ff>Debt Collector</color> attacks, deals minor Quantum <u>Additional DMG</u> to each enemy target hit and consume the Debt Collector's own HP. When Jade becomes the Debt Collector, she cannot gain the SPD boost effect, and her attacks do not consume her HP.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

131403.name: Vow of the Deep
131403.desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jade's ATK to all enemies. At the same time, Jade enhances her Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, increasing its DMG multiplier by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. This enhancement can take effect <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).
131403.simple_desc: Deals Quantum DMG to all enemy units, and this unit's Talent's <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> DMG multiplier increases.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

131404.name: Fang of Flare Flaying
131404.desc: After Jade or the "Debt Collector" unit attacks, gains 1 point of Charge for each enemy target hit. Upon reaching <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points of Charge, consumes the <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points to launch 1 instance of <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jade's ATK to all enemies. This <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> does not generate Charge.\nWhen launching her Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, Jade immediately gains <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Pawned Asset," with each stack increasing CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>, stacking up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> times.
131404.simple_desc: After Jade or the <color=#f29e38ff>"Debt Collector"</color> unit attacks, gains 1 point of Charge for each enemy target hit. Upon reaching <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> points of Charge, consumes the <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> points to launch 1 instance of <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color>, dealing Quantum DMG to all enemies.\nWhen Jade launches the <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color>, gains "Pawned Asset" and increases CRIT DMG, stacking up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> times.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

131406.name: Attack
131406.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

131407.name: Visionary Predation
131407.desc: After using the Technique, inflicts enemies within a set area with Blind Fealty for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Enemies inflicted with Blind Fealty will not initiate attacks on allies. When entering battle via actively attacking enemies inflicted with Blind Fealty, all enemies with Blind Fealty will enter combat simultaneously. After entering battle, deals Quantum DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Jade's ATK to all enemies, and immediately gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of Pawned Asset.
131407.simple_desc: Inflicts Blind Fealty on enemies within a set area. Attacking an enemy with Blind Fealty causes all enemies with Blind Fealty to enter combat simultaneously. Upon entering combat, deals minor Quantum DMG to all enemies and immediately gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of Pawned Asset.

1.point_desc: When an enemy target enters combat, Jade gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of Pawned Asset. When the Debt Collector character's turn starts, additionally gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of Pawned Asset.
When the battle starts, <u>action advances</u> Jade by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1.point_desc: Each Pawned Asset stack from the Talent additionally increases Jade's ATK by <unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak>.
